case_title: ABELINO AQUILINO BARRIOS GUZMAN VS. TALO MAUHINGA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUZMAN, ABELINO AQUILINO BARRIOS AS TO DEFENDANT MAUHINGA, TALO INDIVIDUAL MAUHINGA, LOSEHINA INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUZMAN, ABELINO AQUILINO BARRIOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAUHINGA, TALO INDIVIDUAL MAUHINGA, LOSEHINA INDIVIDUAL $5,337.61 PRINCIPAL, $52.64 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,570.25, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
